PowerShell(Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Drawing; $img = [System.Drawing.Bitmap]::new\("C:\\Users\\julia\\Downloads\\INTERNATIONAL.png"\); $rect = [System.Drawing.Rectangle]::new\(32, 87, 110, 104\); $crop = $img.Clone\($rect, [System.Drawing.Imaging.PixelFormat]::Format32bppArgb\); for \($x=0; $x -lt $crop.Width; $x++\) { for \($y=0; $y -lt $crop.Height; $y++\) { $p = $crop.GetPixel\($x,$y\); if \($p.R -gt 240 -and $p.G -gt 240 -and $p.B -gt 240\) { $crop.SetPixel\($x,$y,[System.Drawing.Color]::FromArgb\(0,255,255,255\)\) } } }; $crop.Save\("C:\\Users\\julia\\OneDrive\\Documents\\Desktop\\Connect2 Website Project\\images\\logo-mark-silver.png"\); $crop.Dispose\(\); $img.Dispose\(\); "saved images/logo-mark-silver.png")
